title: Ocean's Delight (Polymer Port)
body:
<center>

![Oceans Delight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cf278e771482b1bb662beb4d950d82b3a85dcd1.png)

</center>

# Polymer Port for Ocean's Delight

This is a port for [Ocean's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/oceans-delight), making it work fully server side, with all of its functionality intact.

Full functionality of the original mod without installation on the client.

This mod requires server resource pack, about which setup you can read here: https://polymer.pb4.eu/latest/user/resource-pack-hosting/

You can read more about [Ocean's Delight on it's Modrinth page!](https://modrinth.com/mod/oceans-delight)

![Ocean's Delight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af046f92f1b0fb90fe33fd874a173f587251753c.png)
